messages: Can we move this to after lunch?
I dropped the notes in the shared doc.
Please add that to next week's agenda.
Looks good to me, shipping this afternoon.
I'll send a clean summary once the meeting ends.
Can you confirm if legal already reviewed it?
I can take first pass and hand it back by 4.

items: Review sprint notes from this morning

task_prompt: Send a quick OpenMessenger update summarizing my OpenToDo items for today, and include pick up dry cleaning, and include buy dog food, and include call the plumber, and, and include pay the electric bill.
